what_it_does: Records an image attachment metadata entry that links a channel-memory item to an image asset located at image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-44.
observations: YAML front-matter only, no body content
Target is an image:// URI pointing to recent-pitches/p-44
Added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
standouts: Target uses an image:// URI scheme under design-source/recent-pitches/p-44
conventions: Uses a URI-style target rather than a filesystem path
concerns: The image asset p-44 is not described, captioned, or typed within this file
No provenance such as added_by is recorded
notes: A minimal channel-memory attachment record that points a design-source memory entry to an image asset.
questions: What does the image p-44 depict?

purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file is an attachment metadata record and it does record an image attachment target and timestamp.
intention_signals: It appears to be cataloging a visual design asset as an attachment so it can be retrieved alongside its associated channel memory context.
novelty: Uses an image:// URI target rather than a conventional file path or URL.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed pointer from a channel-memory attachment to an image asset, supporting retrieval of associated visual design material.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel-memory attachment metadata record (id att-ec5d4ce5) for the design-source channel, declaring an images attachment whose target is image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-44 and recording its addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to associate a specific image asset with a channel memory entry so the image can be located alongside related design-source context.
